expectations.text: Identifies duplicate leads as potential cause
expectations.evidence: Known Bugs table lists: 'Duplicate leads | save-lead creates new instead of updating | Check existing by phone variants before INSERT' and 'Manual mode updates wrong lead | Multiple leads with same phone | Update ALL leads matching phone, not just by ID'

expectations.text: Checks conversation_mode with fresh DB query
expectations.evidence: Known Bugs table: 'Sophia responds in manual mode | Stale lead object has mode=sophia | Fresh DB query for conversation_mode before check'. Webhook order step 6: 'Fresh mode check — query DB for conversation_mode, NOT use stale lead object'

expectations.text: References the known bug about mode check needing phone-level check
expectations.evidence: Known Bugs table explicitly documents: 'Manual mode updates wrong lead | Multiple leads with same phone | Update ALL leads matching phone, not just by ID'

notes: This is the strongest test case for the skill. The exact bug scenario is documented in the Known Bugs table with root cause and fix. A developer with this skill would immediately identify the duplicate leads + phone-level mode check pattern.
